verses.book: Fragments from the Writings of Peter.
verses.text: III.—On the Advent of Our Saviour.

verses.book: Fragments from the Writings of Peter.
verses.text: And He said unto Judas, “Betrayest thou the Son of God with a kiss?”

verses.book: Fragments from the Writings of Peter.
verses.text: These things and the like, and all the signs which He showed, and His miracles, prove that He is God made man.

verses.book: Fragments from the Writings of Peter.
verses.text: Both things therefore are demonstrated, that He was God by nature, and that He was man by nature.
